channel.title: Cli on Satish Iyer's Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cli on Satish Iyer's Tech Blog

item.title: Desk Cli App
item.description:
Overview of the @desk cli environment.

Start with desk init to create the ~/.desk folder where all desks are stored

desk ls to list all desks available. One per project.

Use desk edit <name> to edit the sh file

/home/satish/.desk/desks ├── book.sh ├── hugo.sh └── letters.sh
